bugs.title: Failed to confirm topic change smoothly
bugs.evidence: Um, I'm not May. I was looking to schedule a checkup but, uh, actually, can you help me, um, with the prescription refill? Um, instead?
bugs.why_it_matters: The agent acknowledged the change but failed to clearly transition to the new topic, which may confuse the user.
bugs.recommendation: The agent should explicitly acknowledge the change in topic and ask if they can proceed with the refill request.

bugs.title: Abrupt ending of interaction
bugs.why_it_matters: The interaction ends without proper assistance despite the user still needing help, which reflects poorly on the agent's support capabilities.
bugs.recommendation: The agent should ensure to clarify whether the user is ready to be connected to a support representative before proceeding to end the call.

overall_notes: The agent did manage to continue with the refill request after the interruption, but there were issues in handling the conversation smoothly. The abrupt ending of the call indicates a failure to manage the user’s request adequately.
